summary: Plan-only repair for five open PRs. Validator marked #75100 and #90694 as security-sensitive, so those exact PR refs are routed to central security handling without any cluster-scoped security action. The two prior fix_needed actions were downgraded to non-mutating keep_independent classifications because no complete executable fix_artifact was present. #91728 remains needs_human because it has passing checks and clean mergeability but lacks mandatory Codex /review and complete merge preflight proof.
